shared-rules.description: Coding standards, architecture, and documentation rules

shared-prompts.description: Reusable prompt fragments for common patterns

build.description: Default build agent for coding tasks

plan.description: Planning agent for architecture and design

reviewer.description: Code review specialist. Use for PR reviews and quality checks.

tester.description: Testing specialist. Use for writing and running tests.

docs.description: Documentation specialist. Use for README, docs, and changelogs.

test.description: Run test suite for current project
test.template: Run the test suite for this project. First detect the test framework, then run all tests and report results.

deploy.template: Deploy the current project. Check the project type and deployment config, then execute the appropriate deploy command.

commit.template: Stage all changes and create a conventional commit with an appropriate type and scope based on the changes.
